title: Crude Stabilizes After Sharp Selloff
description: Oil edged higher, but prices remain under pressure as a US-Iran peace deal could restore major supplies to the market.
excerpt: Oil edged higher, but prices remain under pressure as a US-Iran peace deal could restore major supplies to the market.

title: Iraq Readies to Boost Oil Exports When Hormuz Reopens
description: There are already signs of shipping activity, with Iran moving its own oil tankers and other vessels changing course to head toward the Persian Gulf even before Washington and Tehran sign an interim agreement to end their hostilities later this week.

title: CLNE to Deliver LNG Systems for 2 Power Projects in Puerto Rico
description: Clean Energy Fuels won contracts to design and install liquefied natural gas fuel systems for 2 power projects in Puerto Rico by PR Energy Partners and an unnamed international healthcare manufacturer.
excerpt: Clean Energy Fuels won contracts to design and install liquefied natural gas fuel systems for 2 power projects in Puerto Rico by PR Energy Partners and an unnamed international healthcare manufacturer.

title: TotalEnergies Doubled Oil Trading Profit in Q1
description: TotalEnergies's oil trading profits doubled to about $1 billion in the first quarter as the energy giant went on a crude buying spree in the run-up to the Iran war, its CEO said.
excerpt: TotalEnergies's oil trading profits doubled to about $1 billion in the first quarter as the energy giant went on a crude buying spree in the run-up to the Iran war, its CEO said.

title: Iberdrola Raises $1.7B from Debt Instrument Sale
description: 'The proceeds will be used to finance network investments in Iberdrola's core markets, as well as to refinance selected renewable energy projects'.
excerpt: 'The proceeds will be used to finance network investments in Iberdrola's core markets, as well as to refinance selected renewable energy projects'.

title: Former BP CEO Looney Joins Board of Fusion Power Developer
description: Type One Energy named Bernard Looney, who resigned as BP chief executive in 2023 as he admitted failing to sufficiently disclose personal relationships with colleagues, to its board of directors.
excerpt: Type One Energy named Bernard Looney, who resigned as BP chief executive in 2023 as he admitted failing to sufficiently disclose personal relationships with colleagues, to its board of directors.

title: DFC, I Squared to Form $3B Platform to Expand US Energy Reach in Asia
description: The platform 'will help strengthen energy connectivity between the United States and the Indo-Pacific region, including expanded access to U.S. LNG and related energy exports'.
excerpt: The platform 'will help strengthen energy connectivity between the United States and the Indo-Pacific region, including expanded access to U.S. LNG and related energy exports'.

title: Iran to Get Major Economic Relief under US Deal
description: Iran would be allowed to start oil exports immediately under an interim deal with the U.S. and gain access to a $300 billion economic development program following negotiations for a permanent peace meant to address Tehran's nuclear activities.

title: Oil Extends Losses as Hormuz Reopens
description: Oil fell for a fourth straight session as a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz improved expectations for increased crude supply.
excerpt: Oil fell for a fourth straight session as a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz improved expectations for increased crude supply.

title: Chinese Refining in May at Lowest Level in Nearly 4 Years
description: The question for the market, now that a deal has been reached to reopen Hormuz, is whether Chinese demand for fuels like gasoline will normalize, or whether the rapid transport electrification has permanently dented consumption.

title: Europe Wary of Sending Hormuz Aid as Questions Linger
description: At the Group of Seven Summit, held in France, Europeans have raised a series of questions about what exactly was agreed to before committing to demining missions and patrols.
excerpt: At the Group of Seven Summit, held in France, Europeans have raised a series of questions about what exactly was agreed to before committing to demining missions and patrols.

title: Hundreds of Well Workers offshore Norway Go on Strike
description: The Norwegian Union of Energy Workers is staging strikes against offshore well services companies after refusing proposals that the union sees as years behind collective bargaining agreements in other parts of the oil and gas industry.

title: USA EIA Raises 2026, 2027 Henry Hub Price Forecasts
description: The U.S. Energy Information Administration raised its Henry Hub spot price forecasts for 2026 and 2027 in its latest short term energy outlook.
excerpt: The U.S. Energy Information Administration raised its Henry Hub spot price forecasts for 2026 and 2027 in its latest short term energy outlook.

title: Iberdrola to Invest Nearly $5B in Brazilian State of Bahia by 2030
description: 'Through its subsidiary Neoenergia Coelba, the company will build 54 new substations, more than 2,000 kilometers of high-voltage transmission lines and 42,000 kilometers of medium-voltage distribution networks'.
excerpt: 'Through its subsidiary Neoenergia Coelba, the company will build 54 new substations, more than 2,000 kilometers of high-voltage transmission lines and 42,000 kilometers of medium-voltage distribution networks'.

title: Chevron Expands Exploration Footprint in Greek Mediterranean
description: Chevron and Helleniq Energy have now expanded their partnership in Greece to five offshore concessions.
excerpt: Chevron and Helleniq Energy have now expanded their partnership in Greece to five offshore concessions.
